suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align the documented command-module architecture with current implementation reality (commands currently live in main.rs), or explicitly require refactoring to per-command modules to avoid recurring review noise.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: display-tree scrutiny review reported AGENTS.md expecting commands/tree.rs while implementation follows existing main.rs-centric pattern used across completed features.

rejectedObservations.observation: Tree JSON phase representation uses abbreviated values while show JSON uses full names.
Color handling via NO_COLOR and --no-color should be added to shared guidance.
Document the has_ansi_codes helper pattern from color tests in shared state.
